name: Peace Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425 degrees.
2. In a large mixing bowl, combine the cooked or canned pumpkin, sweetened condensed milk, eggs, cinnamon, salt, nutmeg, ginger, and mincemeat.
3. Mix well until all ingredients are thoroughly combined.
4. Pour the mixture into the unbaked pie shell.
5. Top with additional pumpkin mixture.
6. Bake at 425 degrees for 15 minutes.
7. Reduce heat to 350 degrees and bake for an additional 30 to 35 minutes, or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
